Bangalore|Electronic City.author: vaibhav arora
Bangalore|Electronic City.txt: Avoid Allo Health at all costs. This clinic runs on misleading policies designed to squeeze money out of patients. Follow‑up consultations are only “free” if you buy their overpriced ₹5000 tests — the same tests cost barely ₹1000 elsewhere.
